case_title: JOHN LEWIS VS. GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DELIVERY SERVICE INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY LEWIS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DELIVERY SERVICE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DELIVERY SERVICE INC. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00, SEE ATTACHMENT ENCLOSED: STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-13-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DELIVERY SERVICE INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: RANDY SWART) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DELIVERY SERVICE INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-24-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DELIVERY SERVICE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS STOPPED BY THE SHERIFFS STATIONED IN THE LOBBY DUE TO CONFISATION OF BOTTLE OF ALCHOL WHICH PLAINTIFF CLAIMS IS AN EXHIBIT FOR HIS CASE. DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE APPROPRIATE EXHIBITS.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DELIVERY SERVICE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, PLAINTIFF JOHN LEWIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE OVERNIGHT DEIVERY SERVICE. INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PATRICK STOOPS, BENICIA HUB MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
